task_description: In VLC, perform a full cleanup. First, navigate to the 'Playlists' tab and delete all existing playlists. Second, navigate to the 'More' tab, open 'History', and clear the entire history. Finally, navigate to 'Settings', then 'Advanced', and use the 'Clear media database' option, confirming the action.
original_goal: Play the video "clip_82_HD.mp4", seek forward to the 1 minute and 30-second mark, increase the playback speed to 1.25x, and then lock the screen controls.
prerequisites: There should be at least one playlist and some playback history for the task to be fully demonstrable.
